source_preconditions: The canonical owner profile exists.
The content model and publication states are configured.
The acting maintainer has the required authorization.
At least one public route is deployed.
The information architecture defines principal destinations.
Responsive breakpoints and accessibility semantics are available.
Canonical identity, current role, and at least one primary action are published.
Homepage composition rules are configured.
The canonical person profile exists.
Public identity fields have been approved.
At least one research area or research activity exists.
Related-output relationships are supported.
The publication content type is configured.
Minimum bibliographic fields and identifier rules are defined.
The owner identity is available for authorship matching.
The relevant project or output type exists.
Public release rights and confidentiality boundaries are known.
Canonical institutions and date conventions are defined.
The owner has approved the public career history.
